title: ferray-stats: no lexsort (sort by multiple keys)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.lexsort(keys) sorts by multiple keys — the last key is the primary sort key. This is essential for structured data sorting (sort by column A, break ties by column B). ferray-stats has sort and argsort but no lexsort. Implementation: argsort with a composite comparator, or use the standard library's sort_by with a key chain.
